zh.lifeSummary: 當Humphrey Colquhoun 6th Colquhoun of that Ilk於1350年出生在蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾度巴頓時，他的父親Robert Colquhoun 5th of Colquhoun23歲，母親Luss - Heiress of Luss32歲。他於大約1379年與Margaret Fraser結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1406年4月5日在蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾享年56歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾度巴頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Humphrey Colquhoun 6th Colquhoun of that Ilk于1350年出生在苏格兰登巴頓史爾度巴頓时，他的父亲Robert Colquhoun 5th of Colquhoun23岁，母亲Luss - Heiress of Luss32岁。他于大约1379年与Margaret Fraser结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。他去世于1406年4月5日在苏格兰登巴頓史爾享年56岁，埋葬在苏格兰登巴頓史爾度巴頓。

nameMeanings.name: Colquhoun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the barony of Colquhoun in Dumbartonshire. The name appears to derive from Gaelic còil, cùil ‘nook, corner’, or coill(e) ‘wood’ + cumhann ‘narrow’. The usual Scottish pronunciation is ka-hoon. This is the name of a Scottish family descended from Umfridus de Kilpatrick, who acquired lands in the barony of Colquhoun during the reign of Alexander II (1214–49).

variants.name: Cohoon
meanings: English (Cheshire) and Scottish: variant of   Colquhoun  . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Calhoun
meanings: History: This prominent early American name was brought across the Atlantic Ocean by Scotch-Irish pioneers who entered Pennsylvania c. 1733. The American statesman John c. Calhoun (1782–1850), born in Abbeville District, SC, served in both houses of Congress, was secretary of war, and vice president of the US (1825–32).

variants.name: Cahoon
meanings: Irish (Down and Antrim): variant (reflecting the traditional pronunciation) of Scottish   Colquhoun  .

nameMeanings.name: Humphrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman name, Hunfrid, of Germanic origin, derived from hun ‘bear-cub, warrior’ + fred, frid ‘peace’. The Norman form absorbed the native Old English form, Hunfrith, which existed in England before the Conquest. The spelling with -ph- reflects classicizing influence. Since the 16th century it has enjoyed a modest popularity in England, having been borne most notably by the youngest son of King Henry IV , the Duke of Gloucester ( 1391–1447 ), known as ‘Duke Humphrey’. He was noted as a patron of literature, and founded what became the Bodleian Library at Oxford. In modern times, probably the most famous bearer has been the film star Humphrey Bogart ( 1899–1957 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Humphrey Colquhoun 6th Colquhoun of that Ilk was born in 1350, in Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, his father, Robert Colquhoun 5th of Colquhoun, was 23 and his mother, Luss - Heiress of Luss, was 32. He married Margaret Fraser about 1379. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 5 April 1406, in Dunbartonshire, Scotland, at the age of 56, and was buried in Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Humphrey Colquhoun 6th Colquhoun of that Ilk est né en 1350, à Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, son père, Robert Colquhoun 5th of Colquhoun, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Luss - Heiress of Luss, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Fraser environ 1379. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 5 avril 1406, à Dunbartonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Humphrey Colquhoun 6th Colquhoun of that Ilk 1350 in Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Colquhoun 5th of Colquhoun 23 und seine Mutter Luss - Heiress of Luss 32. Er hat um 1379 Margaret Fraser geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 5. April 1406 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Dunbartonshire, Scotland und wurde in Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey Colquhoun 6th Colquhoun of that Ilk è nato il nel 1350 nel Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Robert Colquhoun 5th of Colquhoun, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Luss - Heiress of Luss, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Fraser circa 1379. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 5 aprile 1406, nel Dunbartonshire, Scotland, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Humphrey Colquhoun 6th Colquhoun of that Ilkが1350年にスコットランドダンバートンシュアイアダンバートンで生まれた時，父Robert Colquhoun 5th of Colquhounは23歳，母Luss - Heiress of Lussは32歳であった。約1379年にMargaret Fraserと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼は1406年4月5日にスコットランドダンバートンシュアイアで56歳で死去し，スコットランドダンバートンシュアイアダンバートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Humphrey Colquhoun 6th Colquhoun of that Ilk(이)가 1350년 스컷랜드 던바토실르 드바턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Colquhoun 5th of Colquhoun(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Luss - Heiress of Luss(은)는 32세였다. 그는 대략 1379년 Margaret Fraser(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1406년 4월 5일 스컷랜드 던바토실르에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 던바토실르 드바턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Humphrey Colquhoun 6th Colquhoun of that Ilk nasceu em 1350, em Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Robert Colquhoun 5th of Colquhoun, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Luss - Heiress of Luss, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Fraser aproximadamente 1379. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 5 de abril de 1406, em Dunbartonshire, Scotland, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Humphrey Colquhoun 6th Colquhoun of that Ilk родился в 1350 г. в местности думбартон, дунбартоншир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Robert Colquhoun 5th of Colquhoun было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Luss - Heiress of Luss, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Fraser около 1379 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 5 апреля 1406 г. в местности дунбартоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности думбартон, дунбартоншир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Humphrey Colquhoun 6th Colquhoun of that Ilk nació en 1350, en Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, su papá, Robert Colquhoun 5th of Colquhoun, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Luss - Heiress of Luss, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Margaret Fraser aproximadamente 1379. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió el 5 de abril de 1406, en Dunbartonshire, Scotland, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland.
